title: Bedrock Shulker Shells
description: Shulkers drop 0-4 shells, matching Bedrock Edition.
body:
Obtaining large numbers of Shulker Boxes is a common issue in vanilla. In Bedrock Edition however, Shulkers can drop one more Shulker Shell per level of Looting! This means that, with Looting III, they can drop up to 4 shells! (In Java Edition, Looting only makes a Shulker more likely to drop 1 shell). This data pack changes the Shulker loot table to **match Bedrock Edition**. It's a (technically vanilla) alternative to a guaranteed 2 Shulker Shell drop, requiring the player to put in the effort for Looting to maximize their number of Shulker Shells. Bedrock Shulker Shells is (understandably) incompatible with [Almost Double Shulker Shells](https://modrinth.com/datapack/almost-double-shulker-shells), which has limits drops to 2 shells per Shulker. | | 0 Shells | 1 Shell | 2 Shells | 3 Shells | 4 Shells | |-------------|:--------:|:-------:|:--------:|:--------:|:--------:| | Unenchanted | 50% | 50% | | | | | Looting I | 33.3% | 33.3% | 33.3% | | | | Looting II | 25% | 25% | 25% | 25% | | | Looting III | 20% | 20% | 20% | 20% | 20% | ## ### MintRefresh:
